hypothesis.economic_rationale: Cross-asset trend persistence may compensate investors for regime and crash risk; the daily canary and BIL safe haven are intended to reduce exposure during broad risk-off conditions.
falsification_conditions: Net real-data OOS value added disappears after the same cost model is applied to every benchmark.
The result is concentrated in a small number of dates, instruments or market regimes.
Reasonable parameter and execution-delay perturbations reverse the candidate's relative value.

blocked_by: point-in-time historical data is not materialized
no untouched locked holdout has been established
